name: Fargo Enterprises Limited
summary: Fargo Enterprises Limited, an enterprise software as a service company, provides cognitive virtual assistant artificial intelligence (AI) platforms and a Knowledge Engine in Australia. The company develops Flamingo platform, an AI platform based on machine learning technology. Its AI products are used by enterprises to enhance sales, services, and internal knowledge processes. The company was formerly known as Flamingo AI Limited and changed its name to Fargo Enterprises Limited in November 2020. Fargo Enterprises Limited is based in Perth, Australia.
